title: Horizontal: Food & Farming
description:
Don't neglect your stomach! The Copper Age is a great time to set up a small farm.

With §lSpice of Life: Carrot Edition§r, eating a variety of foods gives you health bonuses. Try to collect at least 5-10 different food types.

§lCreate: Food§r and §lCreate: The Factory Must Grow§r will eventually let you automate food production — but for now, a simple wheat farm and some animal pens will do.

Cooked meat, bread, stews — variety is the key to survival!
